programs.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programs.desc: Conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, finance and politics. We go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programs.title: Bloomberg Brief
programs.desc: Delivering the market news, data and analysis you need to set your agenda.

programs.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programs.desc: Daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. Hosted by Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern.

programs.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programs.desc: Bloomberg Open Interest with Matt Miller and Dani Burger - delivers the market-moving news you need to know to get a jump start on the US trading day.

programs.title: Bloomberg Tech
programs.desc: The only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories.

programs.title: Bloomberg Deals
programs.desc: A weekly program that delivers high-impact, editorially driven coverage of the most important corporate transactions shaping the global market.
